MOTION Notice Of Motioin For Reci=Onsideration Of Sanctions Order
Off Calendar May-06-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Reconsideration of Sanction Order issued on 4/5/2004 to Stephen K. Lightfoot, Esq., in the amount of $250.00, and Joinger of Defendant and Cross-Complainant Thomas Soevyn, in plaintiff's motion for reconsideration of Sanction order are heard this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion and joinder is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated as to counsel for plaintiff and Defendant (Rolando William Pasquali, Esq. Court signed Order. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)
